summary: Tested Client Portal Authentication, Practice Management, and Mode Selector Remember Choice features. Fixed a bug in PracticeManagement.jsx where SelectItem components had empty string values causing React errors. All 12 features tested and working.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - charts render but show warnings. Consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ChartContainer component.

passed_tests: Backend: /api/client/register - Creates new client with JWT token
Backend: /api/client/login - Authenticates client and returns token
Backend: /api/client/me - Returns client profile when authenticated
Frontend: Client Portal Login form - Email/password inputs present
Frontend: Client Portal Demo Login - 'Try Demo Account' button works
Frontend: Client Portal Dashboard - Read-only view with Summary, Reports, Goals, Adviser tabs
Frontend: Client Portal Logout - Clears session and shows login form
Frontend: Practice Management Dashboard - KPI cards showing Urgent Tasks, Hours, Billable Value, Outstanding
Frontend: Practice Management Tabs - Dashboard, Tasks, Meetings, Time Tracking, Billing, Compliance all clickable
Frontend: Practice Management New Task Dialog - Opens and closes correctly (after fix)
Frontend: Practice Management Start Timer button - Present and functional
Frontend: Mode Selector Remember Choice - Checkbox saves preference to localStorage
Frontend: Mode Selector Auto-redirect - Redirects to remembered mode on page load
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: PracticeManagement.jsx had SelectItem components with value='' which caused React errors. Changed to value='none' and value='internal' respectively.
Minor: ChartContainer components in PracticeManagement.jsx show console warnings about negative width/height. Charts still render but warnings could be cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: Created test client during backend testing with email pattern test_client_*@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested Client Portal with JWT authentication (login/register/demo), Practice Management with all 6 tabs (Dashboard/Tasks/Meetings/Time Tracking/Billing/Compliance), and Remember my choice feature on Mode Selector. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in PracticeManagement.jsx. All features working. Demo login uses localStorage-only token. Practice Management uses mock data in component state. Backend auth endpoints are real but demo login bypasses backend validation.

mocked_apis.Client Portal: MOCKED - Client portfolio data in ClientPortalMerged.jsx is mocked
mocked_apis.Practice Management: MOCKED - Tasks, meetings, time entries, invoices are mocked in component state
mocked_apis.Demo Login: MOCKED - Uses localStorage token without real backend validation

tests: Summary tab with portfolio allocation and net worth trend
KPI cards: Urgent Tasks, Hours, Billable Value, Outstanding
New Task dialog opens and closes
Auto-redirect to remembered mode on page load

bug_fixed.description: SelectItem components in PracticeManagement.jsx had empty string values causing React error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
bug_fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='none' and value='internal' respectively, and updated form handlers to convert these values to null when submitting
